metadata.use_for: Deterministic medication/supplement reconciliation to prevent lethal interactions.
metadata.red_flags: Opioids+LDN, serotonergics+methylene blue, anticoagulants+bleeding symptoms, bleomycin+HBOT, bortezomib+IVC.
metadata.triage_questions: List ALL meds + supplements. Any opioids/suboxone? anticoagulants? SSRIs/SNRIs/MAOI? chemo history?

content.s0_quick_reference_internal:
- Always ask full med/supp list when proposing anything.
- High-risk classes: opioids, anticoagulants, serotonergics/MAOI, chemo agents.
- Output: NO-GO / HOLD / OK-with-spacing decision.
content.s1_claims_discipline_internal:
- We do not adjust Rx dosing remotely.
- We identify interaction risk and route appropriately.
content.s2_patient_communication_public: To keep you safe, I need a complete list of medications and supplements. Some combinations can be dangerous, so we may need to pause or space certain items.
content.s3_pharmacokinetics_adme_internal:
Core interaction families:
- Serotonergics + methylene blue → serotonin toxicity.
- Opioids/buprenorphine + LDN → withdrawal.
- Anticoagulants + antiplatelet agents → bleeding.
- Bleomycin history + HBOT → pulmonary risk.
- Bortezomib + high-dose vitamin C → antagonism.
content.s4_limitations_failure_modes_internal: - Failure mode: missing OTC/herbals (CBD, grapefruit, quercetin) → ask explicitly.
content.s5_clinical_decision_trees_internal:
IF opioids/suboxone/methadone/fentanyl → NO-GO for LDN.
IF serotonergics/MAOI/tramadol/linezolid/DXM → NO-GO for methylene blue until MD washout plan.
IF anticoagulants → bleeding screen + caution with curcumin/others.
Always log meds in snapshot and re-check.
